---
title: "Final Project"
author: Lena Nezamzadeh, Ria Bhatia
format: html
editor: source
embed-resources: true
---

## Data

In this lab, we will be looking at two data sets regarding healthcare use at both the household and individual level. 


## Sample Section

```{r}

add <- function(x,y){
  x + y
}

add(4,4)
```
